# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Profile Upload
Description: Allow users to upload profile pictures and documents.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

function upu_enqueue_scripts() {
    wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'upu_enqueue_scripts');

function upu_upload_form() {
    if (isset($_POST['submit'])) {
        $uploaded_files = $_FILES['user_files'];
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir()['basedir'] . '/user-files/';
        
        if (!file_exists($upload_dir)) {
            mkdir($upload_dir, 0755, true);
        }

        foreach ($uploaded_files['name'] as $key => $file) {
            if ($uploaded_files['error'][$key] === UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
                $tmp_name = $uploaded_files['tmp_name'][$key];
                $name = basename($uploaded_files['name'][$key]);
                $ext = pathinfo($name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
                $allowed_types = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'pdf', 'doc', 'docx'];

                if (in_array(strtolower($ext), $allowed_types)) {
                    move_uploaded_file($tmp_name, "$upload_dir/$name");
                } else {
                    echo "File type not allowed: $name";
                }
            }
        }
        echo "Files uploaded successfully.";
    }

    ?>
    <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
        <input type="file" name="user_files[]" multiple>
        <input type="submit" name="submit" value="Upload">
    </form>
    <?php
}

function upu_shortcode() {
    ob_start();
    upu_upload_form();
    return ob_get_clean();
}
add_shortcode('user_profile_upload', 'upu_shortcode');
?>
